ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'NonLC',Possess_Guarantor_Y_N__c = true,ISBLANK( China_Credit_Insurance_Guarantor_Code__c ), ISBLANK( Guarantor_English_Address__c )), TRUE, FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: There is the China Credit Insurance Confirmation and China Credit Insurance Guarantor Code,Guarantor English Address Cannot be Empty !
